subcodes.first_line: The light of guidance shone forth from the supreme horizon, and the star of eternal glory dawned from the dayspring of contingent being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نور هدايت از افق اعلی ساطع شد و کوکب عزّت ابديّه از مطلع امکان طالع گرديد
subcodes.subjects: @light and darkness, @growth of the Cause, @being a source of light; guidance
